stemHtml: What are the main sources of radiation at height?

options.a: Ionisation of the layers in the atmosphere due to the bombardment of galactic (cosmic) radiation.
options.b: Galactic (cosmic) radiation caused by galactic particles and solar radiation caused by solar flares.
options.c: Solar radiation caused by solar flares and nuclear radiation caused by the Earth’s natural radiation.
options.d: Galactic (cosmic) and nuclear radiation, which are both caused by the Earth’s natural radiation.
